assignments.description: We set it to rejected as the reship process will create new fulfillment records
assignments.name: Set_Fulfillment_Status_to_Rejected
assignments.label: Set Fulfillment Status to Rejected

assignments.name: Set_Required_Shipping_and_Get_Shipping_Information
assignments.label: Set Required Shipping and Get Shipping Information

decisions.description: We check to see if the API call was success.
decisions.name: Is_API_Call_Success
decisions.label: Is API Call Success

decisions.description: If the selection was state override we need to set more information from the Reship Side of the flow. This decision will allow us to connect over to that assignment.
decisions.name: State_Override
decisions.label: State Override

decisions.name: Was_There_Any_Fulfillment_Records_Found
decisions.label: Was There Any Fulfillment Records Found?

Flow.description: This flow will allow users to reship a Genetic Test to a customer.

formulas.name: form_FulfillmentStatus
formulas.expression: IF({!btn_Type.value}= "Reship", "Rejected", IF({!btn_Type.value}= "Reorder", "10x Cancelled - Change Lab", IF({!btn_Type.value}= "State Override", "State Override", TEXT({!Loop_Through_Fulfillment_Records.Status__c}))))

Flow.label: Screenflow - Genetic Test Reship

recordLookups.description: Since we are reshipping we need to close out any open Genetic Test fulfillment records.
recordLookups.name: Get_Open_Fulfillment_Records
recordLookups.label: Get Open Fulfillment Records

fields.name: txtError_API_Call
fields.fieldText:
There was an issue submitting the request to the Lab Provider.


Error Message:

{!GeneTest_order_submission.errorMessage}

fields.name: txt_ShippingHeader
fields.fieldText:
Patient Shipping Details


Please ensure the shipping information is correct below and then finish the submission request.

fields.name: txtErrorBothCheckboxChecked
fields.fieldText: Please only check either "Use Account Billing Address" or "Use Account Shipping Address"

textTemplates.name: txt_ReshipNotificationMessage
